  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i7
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVidia GeForce RTX2060
  • Storage: 15 GB available space

specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel 7th generation or equivalent
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 1080 (or AMD equivalent)
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: 8 GB of VRAM is required
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel 10th generation or equivalent
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: RTX 3000 series (or AMD equivalent)
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: 8 GB of VRAM is required

specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: 32/64-bit Windows 7 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-7600 / AMD equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 / AMD equivalent or greater
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
  • VR Support: OpenXR, requires motion controllers
  • Additional Notes: VR headset is required

specification.minimum:
